live_matches.match_title: Bayer Leverkusen vs RB Leipzig - MD 32 - 2 May 2026
live_matches.description: Bayer Leverkusen take on RB Leipzig in a blockbuster Bundesliga clash, with both sides aiming to strengthen their push near the top of the table. Leverkusen will look to capitalize on home advantage, while Leipzig’s pace and attacking quality promise an exciting, high-intensity encounter. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
